categories.name: Buttons
categories.description: Stylized buttons — icon buttons, toggle packs, action button groups.

categories.name: Inputs
categories.description: Entry, Combobox, Checkbox, Slider variations — styled or with extended functionality.

categories.name: Forms
categories.description: Multi-field configurations — login, signup, settings panels, contact forms.

categories.name: Layout
categories.description: Grid / row / column containers, splitters, scroll areas — reusable layout primitives.

categories.name: Navigation
categories.description: Sidebars, top bars, tab strips, breadcrumbs, menu drawers.

categories.name: Dialogs & Modals
categories.description: Alerts, confirm dialogs, file pickers, settings popups, full-screen modals.

categories.name: Cards & Panels
categories.description: Info cards, profile cards, stat tiles, collapsible panels — visual containers with content.

categories.name: Mini-Apps
categories.description: Full small applications — todos, calculators, calendars, music players.

categories.name: Templates & Starters
categories.description: Empty skeletons for new projects — sidebar+content shells, tab-based shells, blank window with menu.

categories.name: Other
categories.description: Anything that doesn't fit the other categories.
